articles.title: FDA Blocks Promising Melanoma Drug While One-Third of Patients See Tumor Shrinkage
articles.summary: The FDA blocked a genetically engineered melanoma treatment called RP1 despite clinical trial data showing tumors shrank in a third of patients. The agency's interference under Makary demonstrates the familiar pattern of regulatory capture blocking patient access to potentially life-saving treatments.

articles.title: 25-Year Government Fraud: Corrupted Hyperbaric Therapy Research Denies Veterans Healing
articles.summary: For over 25 years, government-funded hyperbaric medicine research used a biologically active placebo that generates 300% increases in circulating stem cells, corrupting all trial data. This multimillion-dollar fraud has systematically blocked veterans from accessing proven hyperbaric oxygen therapy for PTSD and brain injuries.

articles.title: UNC's Hidden Role in COVID Origins: What North Carolina Taxpayers Weren't Told
articles.summary: North Carolina's flagship public university may have played an undisclosed role in COVID research, yet taxpayers and families remain in the dark. The investigation reveals another layer of institutional cover-up surrounding gain-of-function research and pandemic origins.

articles.title: Autism-Vaccine Researcher Arraigned as Medical Literature Plagued by Fake Studies
articles.summary: An autism-vaccine researcher faces criminal charges while 'accidental watermarks' expose widespread fraud in medical literature. Mass resignations hit zombie journals as the replication crisis deepens, revealing the systematic corruption of medical publishing.

articles.title: Texas Hospital Secretly Continued Child Sex-Change Surgeries Despite State Ban
articles.summary: Texas Children's Hospital doctors allegedly performed procedures on children despite Texas law prohibiting such interventions, with Governor Abbott calling them 'child abuse.' The hospital has now agreed to end the procedures and fund a detransition clinic, exposing systematic defiance of child protection laws.

articles.title: FDA Slams ImmunityBio for Unsupported Cancer Claims, Stock Crashes 21%
articles.summary: The FDA issued warnings against ImmunityBio for allegedly misleading cancer treatment claims, wiping out $2 billion in market cap. The regulatory action exposes how biotech companies manipulate data and mislead investors about treatment efficacy while patients suffer.

articles.summary: Republican Senate health committee chairman demands answers from federally funded health providers allegedly offering gender transition services to minors. The probe reveals how taxpayer dollars fund both harmful procedures and the legal defenses protecting them from scrutiny.
